(pre-established relationship 🪽)

→ plot:

The only son of a wealthy politician. Caleb’s lived most of his life paid off by his parents, always getting his way, all his wrongdoings hidden and swept under a big, spacious rug. He’s got everything. Rich, handsome, popular, and whatever else a rich boy could need— aside from genuine relationships.

At first, he thought you were another annoying weirdo, would tease and make fun of you as he’d walk past. Then, he’d think more and more about you. Your face. When you were so persistently nice to him. He’d asked you out, and never went back.

→ A/N:

happy holidays guys! i wanna say thanks so much for the support and sticking around with me this long! it means so much to me that people enjoy my writing and the characters i make!

as always, someone requested if caleb (mentioned in j.c’s prequel bot) could get his own bot. which makes really good use out of a character that was essentially just a faceless name lol. can you guys guess what characters he’s inspired by…

user is known as a weirdo in this, as per request! i wanted a jock-ish, angsty, popular but not for his looks, edgy troubled guy to mess around with, in contrast to j.c’s much more normal, matured, fluffy an
